product: HIPAA support for the Databricks Add-in for Excel
tagline: The Databricks Add in for Excel (Public Preview) is now available for workspaces with HIPAA compliance across all supported regions.
what_it_does: The Databricks Add in for Excel (Public Preview) is now available for workspaces with HIPAA compliance across all supported regions. Preview This feature is in Public Preview. The Databricks Excel Add in connects your Databricks workspace to Microsoft Excel, bringing governed Lakehouse data directly into your spreadsheets to help you move from data to decisions faster.
why_it_matters: The Databricks Excel Add in connects your Databricks workspace to Microsoft Excel, bringing governed Lakehouse data directly into your spreadsheets to help you move from data to decisions faster.
key_takeaway: The Databricks Add in for Excel (Public Preview) is now available for workspaces with HIPAA compliance across all supported regions.
